display.purpose: Login and main screen titles only.

headline.purpose: Form titles and prominent section labels.

title.purpose: Card headings, compact panels, and grouped controls.

body.purpose: Form values, helper text, and readable operational copy.

label.purpose: Field labels, buttons, tabs, and compact actions.

shadows.name: surface-low
shadows.purpose: Subtle lift on single current-task surfaces.

shadows.name: overlay-high
shadows.purpose: Dropdowns and floating menus that leave the page flow.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Fast fade, zoom, and state changes.

motion.name: state-standard
motion.purpose: Default interaction transition for hover and focus.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Use for the next safe money action or primary login action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { min-height: 48px; padding: 0 16px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-primary, oklch(0.205 0 0)); color: var(--color-primary-foreground, oklch(0.985 0 0)); font: 500 14px/1 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.205 0 0 / 0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Use for secondary choices that must remain visible without competing.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { min-height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.922 0 0 / 0.3); color: var(--color-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); font: 500 14px/1 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; transition: background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.922 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Mobile Input
components.description: Use for login, amount entry, reference numbers, and reconciliation values.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 8px; color: var(--color-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); font-family: 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; } .ds-label { font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; font-weight: 500; } .ds-input { width: 100%; min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid var(--color-input, oklch(0.922 0 0)); border-radius: 999px; background: oklch(0.922 0 0 / 0.3); color: var(--color-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); padding: 4px 12px; font: 400 16px/1.5 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; transition: border-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); }

components.name: Task Card
components.description: Use for a single current task such as login or transaction confirmation.
components.html:
Pasok sa account

Mobile number at PIN lang.

...
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 18px; background: var(--color-card, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--color-card-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); padding: 24px 0; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px oklch(0.145 0.003 95 / 0.1); font-family: 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { display: grid; gap: 8px; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-card-header h2 { margin: 0; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.3; font-weight: 500; } .ds-card-header p { margin: 0; color: var(--color-muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-card-body { padding: 0 24px; }

components.name: Segmented Tabs
components.description: Use for a small set of peer modes, never for dense operator navigation.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0; min-height: 36px; padding: 3px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--color-muted, oklch(0.97 0 0)); color: var(--color-muted-foreground, oklch(0.556 0 0)); font-family: 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; } .ds-tab { min-height: 29px; padding: 4px 8px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 14px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.6); font: 500 14px/1 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; transition: color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), background-color 180ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-tab:hover { color: var(--color-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--color-ring, oklch(0.708 0 0)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.708 0 0 / 0.5); } .ds-tab-active { background: var(--color-background, oklch(1 0 0)); color: var(--color-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); }

components.name: Select Item
components.description: Use inside dropdowns for compact, familiar choices.
components.html: Cash In
components.css: .ds-select-item { position: relative; display: flex; width: 100%; align-items: center; gap: 10px; min-height: 36px; border-radius: 14px; padding: 8px 32px 8px 12px; color: var(--color-popover-foreground, oklch(0.145 0 0)); font: 400 14px/1.4 'Figtree Variable', sans-serif; outline: none; user-select: none; transition: background-color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 100ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-select-item:hover, .ds-select-item:focus-visible { background: var(--color-accent, oklch(0.97 0 0)); color: var(--color-accent-foreground, oklch(0.205 0 0)); } .ds-select-check { position: absolute; right: 8px; width: 14px; height: 14px; }

narrative.overview:
Ganansya should feel like the clean page of a trusted tindahan ledger: direct, familiar, and calm enough to use while a customer is waiting. A tindera uses Ganansya on a budget Android phone at a bright sari-sari store counter, so the default theme is light, high-contrast, and quiet.

The visual system is neutral-first and task-first. It uses Figtree, rounded controls, clear borders, and generous tap areas to make money operations feel stable. The current codebase is built from shadcn-svelte primitives with Tailwind CSS tokens, Hugeicons, and low-motion state transitions.

This system rejects cluttered pages, complex banking-app patterns, flashy fintech styling, dense dashboards, crypto-wallet energy, and overloaded POS screens. Minimalism is allowed only when the current task remains complete.
keyCharacteristics: Mobile-first product UI for store operators before owner/admin density.
Restrained color strategy: neutral surfaces, blackened action ink, and reserved danger.
Large rounded controls that feel forgiving on small phones.
Flat tonal layers at rest, with overlays lifted only when hierarchy requires it.
Taglish-ready copy that keeps labels short and operational.

rules.name: The Money First Rule
rules.body: The strongest contrast belongs to amounts, confirmations, and the next safe action.

rules.name: The Reserved Red Rule
rules.body: Red is for risk: wrong PIN, invalid amount, failed confirmation, or destructive action. Never use it for decoration.

rules.name: The No Literal Extremes Rule
rules.body: New work must use OKLCH tokens and must not introduce literal `#000` or `#fff` values.

rules.name: The Plain Number Rule
rules.body: Amounts must be larger, darker, or better positioned than nearby explanatory text. Do not hide money inside small captions.

rules.name: The No Display Labels Rule
rules.body: Buttons, form labels, and data labels use the product scale, not display typography.

rules.name: The Flat Counter Rule
rules.body: The default screen should feel like a clean counter surface. Lift only the element that is temporarily above the task.

dos: Do prioritize tindera mobile screens before owner/admin density.
Do keep tap targets at 48px for primary mobile actions.
Do use Action Ink for the next clear action and Risk Red only for real risk.
Do keep pages minimal while still completing the full workflow.
Do use Taglish labels that can be understood without training-heavy explanation.
Do keep overlays, selects, and dialogs visually familiar so the tool disappears into the store task.
donts: Don't create a cluttered app with too many elements competing on one page.
Don't use complex banking-app patterns, flashy fintech styling, dense dashboards, crypto-wallet energy, or overloaded POS screens.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, or hero-metric layouts.
Don't use heavy color or full-saturation accents on inactive states.
Don't use a modal as the first answer when inline confirmation or progressive reveal can solve the workflow.
